chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-12 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case. 08.05.2024 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, AAG along with Aijaz Ali Halepoto, ADC-II on behalf of DC Naushahro Feroze and Ahmed Khan Kakepoto, Assistant Executive Engineer ***************** Learned AAG has filed comments on behalf of Respondent No.5, which are taken on record, a copy whereof has been provided to learned Counsel for the Petitioner. Perusal of comments reveals that case of the petitioner for appointment as Tubewell Operator (BPS-05) was recommended by DRC on 28.02.2024 and is pending for signatures of member(s) of DRC. Thereafter, offer order will be issued to the petitioner in accordance with law. Petitioner and his Counsel is satisfied and this petition is disposed of. Let this exercised be done within fifteen days without fail and compliance report be submitted accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Faisal Mumtaz/PS
